observations.note: New snapshot file existence verification block integrates cleanly into Phase 02 workflow without breaking existing sections. Proper positioning between snapshot creation (STORY-502) and validation checkpoint ensures correct execution sequence.
Template variable ${STORY_ID} correctly preserved without runtime expansion in configuration file. Markdown structure maintains proper hierarchy with no broken links or unbalanced code blocks.

Verification block follows AAA pattern implicitly: Arrange (Glob call), Act (pattern matching), Assert (HALT on failure). Clear error message provides diagnostic context when snapshot file is not found.

File structure validated successfully. Ready for Phase 02 orchestrator execution. Snapshot verification will function as intended to prevent false positive phase completion when snapshot file creation fails.
Dependency chain validated: Test Integrity Snapshot (STORY-502) → Snapshot File Existence Verification (STORY-514) → Validation Checkpoint. All three components integrate without conflicts.

recommendations.recommendation: Monitor Phase 02 orchestrator execution to ensure snapshot file creation succeeds in practice. Current integration test validates structure only; runtime behavior should be verified during operational deployment.

Consider adding cross-reference to RCA-043 in the snapshot verification block for context on why this check was added. Current documentation is clear but additional context would help future maintainers.
